rawFact: Missing milk? Batteries? Detergent? pandamart delivers over 20,000 products in under 25 minutes through your foodpanda app. It's everyday online shopping made easy. sourceTitle: Grab to Acquire Delivery Hero’s foodpanda Delivery Business in Taiwan | Grab SG
rawFact: Niklas Östberg, CEO and Co-Founder of Delivery Hero, said, “The foodpanda team in Taiwan has built a fantastic business and we thank them for their hard work. A transaction like this is a significant undertaking, but we are delighted to have agreed this cash deal, which reflects strength and attractiveness of the business in Taiwan. This divestment is a key first step in our ongoing strategic review.”

sourceTitle: Grab to Acquire Delivery Hero’s foodpanda Delivery Business in Taiwan | Grab SG
rawFact: Grab and foodpanda are committed to maintaining a high level of service for all stakeholders throughout this process. Until the deal closes, Delivery Hero is fully committed to continue operating foodpanda Taiwan as usual. The parties have entered into a Support Services Agreement under which Delivery Hero will provide transition support services to foodpanda Taiwan in the period following Closing, to ensure that the local community remains well-supported as they move to the Grab platform.

sourceTitle: Grab to Acquire Delivery Hero’s foodpanda Delivery Business in Taiwan | Grab SG
rawFact: Grab is targeting completion of the full platform migration of users, merchant-partners and driver-partners from foodpanda to the Grab app by early 2027.
summary: Grab is targeting completion of the full platform migration of users, merchant-partners and driver-partners from foodpanda to the Grab app by early 2027.
